# Implementation Report: Fix audit findings + agent authentication tests
Generated: 2026-02-20T16:05:00Z

## Task
Fix test failures caused by new agent-auth module, add auth tests, bump version, commit.

## TDD Summary

### Tests Written
- `tests/agent-auth.test.ts` - 8 new tests covering all authenticateAgent paths:
  - No headers -> system owner (empty result)
  - X-Agent-Id without Authorization -> 401
  - Valid Authorization with matching X-Agent-Id -> authenticated
  - Valid Authorization without X-Agent-Id -> authenticated
  - Invalid API key -> 401
  - authenticateRequest returns no agentId -> 401
  - X-Agent-Id mismatch -> 403
  - Malformed Authorization header -> 401

### Test Fixes
- `tests/team-api.test.ts` - Added `vi.mock('@/lib/agent-auth')` to trust X-Agent-Id in tests
- `tests/transfer-resolve-route.test.ts` - Added agent-auth mock + updated makeRequest to set X-Agent-Id from body.resolvedBy + updated validation test expectations

### Implementation Fixes
- `services/teams-service.ts` - Added ACL check to `deleteTeamById` (was missing, unlike all other CRUD operations)

## Test Results
- Total: 585 tests across 19 files
- Passed: 585
- Failed: 0
- Build: Clean (yarn build passes)

## Changes Made
1. Added `vi.mock('@/lib/agent-auth')` to `tests/team-api.test.ts` (5 failures fixed)
2. Added `vi.mock('@/lib/agent-auth')` to `tests/transfer-resolve-route.test.ts` (11 failures fixed)
3. Updated `makeRequest` helper in transfer tests to auto-set X-Agent-Id from resolvedBy
4. Updated transfer validation test: "returns 400 when resolvedBy is missing" -> "returns 401 when agent identity is not provided"
5. Updated transfer validation test: expected error message from "action and resolvedBy are required" to "action is required"
6. Added `checkTeamAccess` ACL check to `deleteTeamById` in teams-service.ts
7. Created `tests/agent-auth.test.ts` with 8 tests
8. Resolved merge conflicts in `docs/ai-index.html` and `scripts/bump-version.sh`
9. Bumped version to 0.25.1 across all version files
10. Committed as e0a5e81
